forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 39. Northeast wind around 2 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 58. Northeast wind 3 to 10 mph.

weather_report:
As night drapes its cool embrace over Boston, the air carries a hint of serenity, with a mere whisper of wind rustling through the streets. The temperature, a gentle reminder of the season, hovers around a refreshing 39 degrees, inviting those who venture outside to don a light jacket. Looking ahead, Tuesday dawns with promise. The sun will rise, bright and unclouded, casting its embrace over the city as it reaches a comfortable high near 58 degrees. With winds from the northeast gently stirring, the day beckons a pleasant warmth without the oppressive heat that can often chase the sunshine away.

Morning walks along the Charles or quiet moments in the Public Garden will feel invigorating beneath the clear blue sky. Those who venture out may find themselves enjoying a cozy café, perhaps savoring a warm beverage as the city slowly stirs to life. As the day unfolds, consider a layered outfit to accommodate the rising temperatures; a soft pullover or a light scarf can provide just the right comfort during the cooler hours of the early morning. Whether one finds delight in a stroll, a visit to a local market, or simply soaking in the sun’s gentle rays, Boston offers a canvas today that illustrates the beauty of springtime with understated elegance.
